examples.english: I've been asking you about these doors for months.
examples.chinese: 我问你这些门的事情已经有好几个月了。

expressions.explanation:
用法说明

 普通时间词加上 after 后接同一个普通时间词，也可强调一种状态持续了很长时间或一个动作在很长时间内反复发生。

examples.english: I wondered what kept her in Paris decade after decade.
examples.chinese: 我在想是什么让她在巴黎住了一个十年又一个十年。

examples.english: They can go on making losses, year after year, without fearing that they will go bust.
examples.chinese: 他们会年复一年地亏损，不用担心他们会破产。

expressions.text: 4.130 in and within for end of a period
expressions.explanation:
in 和 within 用于一段时间的结束

in 用于表示某事发生或将会发生在某个时间段结束之前。在比较正式的英语里，则用 within。

examples.english: Can we get to the airport in an hour?
examples.chinese: 我们能在一小时之内赶到机场吗？

examples.english: That coat must have cost you more than I earn in a year.
examples.chinese: 你在那件外套上花的钱肯定比我一年挣的还多。

examples.english: The face of a city can change completely in a year.
examples.chinese: 一个城市的面貌能在一年内彻底改变。

examples.english: They should get the job finished within a few days.
examples.chinese: 他们应该会在几天内完成工作。

expressions.explanation: in 和 within 也用于表示某事只用了很短的时间。

examples.english: The The clouds evaporated in seconds.
examples.chinese: 云在几秒钟内就消散了。

examples.english: What an expert can do in minutes may take you hours to accomplish.
examples.chinese: 一个专家几分钟就能做的事，你可能需要几小时才能完成。

examples.english: Within a few months, the barnyard had been abandoned.
examples.chinese: 不到几个月，这个谷仓场院就被废弃了。

expressions.text: 4.132 for and in with general or specific time
expressions.explanation:
for 和 in 用于一般或特定时间

 for 和 in 可用于否定陈述句，表示在一个时间段内某事没有发生。在这个用法中，for 和 in 可与具体的时间单位连用，也可与一般的时间表达式连用。

examples.english: He hadn't had a proper night's sleep for a month.
examples.chinese: 他已经有一个月没好好睡过一个晚上的觉了。

examples.english: I haven't seen a chart for forty years!
examples.chinese: 我已经有40年没看过一张图表了！

examples.english: The team had not heard from Stabler in a month.
examples.chinese: 小组已经一个月没听到斯特布勒的音信了。

examples.english: He hasn't slept in a month.
examples.chinese: 他一个月没睡觉了。

examples.english: I haven't seen him for years.
examples.chinese: 我好多年没见到他了。

examples.english: Let's have a dinner party. We haven't had one in years.
examples.chinese: 我们举办一次家庭晚宴吧。我们已经有好几年没举办过了。

examples.english: I haven't fired a gun in years.
examples.chinese: 我多年没有开过枪了。

expressions.explanation:
名词短语表示持续时间

注意，对于动词 last、wait 和 stay，状语可以用名词短语代替 for 引导的介词短语。

动词 take 和 spend 也可用于表示持续，但状语只能是名词短语。

examples.english: The campaign lasts four weeks at most.
examples.chinese: 这场战役最多持续四个星期。

examples.english: His speech lasted for exactly 14 and a half minutes.
examples.chinese: 他的演讲整整持续了14分钟半。

examples.english: 'Wait a minute,' the voice said.
examples.chinese: ”等一下。”那个声音说道。

examples.english: He stayed a month, five weeks, six weeks.
examples.chinese: 他待了一个月，五个星期，六个星期。

examples.english: It took me a month to lose that feeling of being a spectator.
examples.chinese: 我花了一个月才摆脱了当旁观者的那种感觉。

examples.english: What once took a century now took only ten months.
examples.chinese: 曾经需要一个世纪的现在只需要10个月。

examples.english: He spent five minutes washing and shaving.
examples.chinese: 他花了 5 分钟时间梳洗和剃须。

expressions.explanation:
大致的持续时间

 如果不想精确说明某事持续的时间，可用下列词语之一：about、almost、nearly、around、more than、less than 等等。

对某事持续的时间作一般性陈述时，可用 up to 表示事情将延续或需要的最长时间。

也可用 or so、or more、or less 和 or thereabouts 之类的表达式表示不太确定的时间。

almost、about、nearly 和 thereabouts 也用于谈论事件发生的时间，详见 4.100 小节。

examples.english: They've lived there for more than thirty years.
examples.chinese: 他们在那里住了30多年。

examples.english: They have not been allowed to form unions for almost a decade.
examples.chinese: 他们差不多有10年时间未获得允许成立工会。

examples.english: The three of us travelled around together for about a month that summer.
examples.chinese: 那年夏天，我们三个人一起到处旅行了大约一个月。

examples.english: In less than a year, I learned enough Latin to pass the entrance exam.
examples.chinese: 在一年不到的时间内，我学会了足够的拉丁语，通过了入学考试。

examples.english: He had been in command of HMS Churchill for nearly a year.
examples.chinese: 他指挥英国皇家舰艇“丘吉尔号”接近一年了。

examples.english: Refresher training for up to one month each year was the rule for all.
examples.chinese: 每年最多一个月的进修培训是适用于所有人的通例。

examples.english: He has been writing about tennis and golf for forty years or so.
examples.chinese: 他写关于网球和高尔夫球的文章已经有40年左右了。

examples.english: Our species probably practised it for a million years or more.
examples.chinese: 我们人类一直做这事可能有 100 万年或更长时间。

examples.english: Hopes which have prevailed so strongly for a century or more. ……
examples.chinese: 一个世纪或更长时间以来一直如此强烈的希望。

centers.english: Talking about the whole of a period

expressions.explanation:
如果想强调某事在整个时间段内持续发生，可用 all 作限定词与很多普通时间词连用。

也可在普通时间词前面用 whole 作修饰语。

all through、right through 和 throughout 也可与 the 以及很多普通时间词连用，或者与特定的十年期、年份、月份或特殊的时间段连用。

表示事件的词有时代替时间词,强调某事在事件的整个持续过程中发生。

examples.english: 'I've been wanting to do this all day,' she said.
examples.chinese: “我一整天都在想做这个。”她说。

examples.english: I've been here all night.
examples.chinese: 我整夜都在这里。

examples.english: They said you were out all afternoon.
examples.chinese: 他们说你整个下午都在外面。

examples.english: We've not seen them all summer.
examples.chinese: 我们整个夏天都没见到他们。

examples.english: It took me the whole of my first year to adjust.
examples.chinese: 我花了整整第一年时间来调整。

examples.english: ...scientists who are monitoring food safety the whole time. ……
examples.chinese: 一直在监控食品安全的科学家们

examples.english: ...people who have not worked for a whole year. ……
examples.chinese: 整整一年没有工作的人

examples.english: Discussions and arguments continued all through the day.
examples.chinese: 讨论和争论持续了一整天。

examples.english: Right through the summer months they are rarely out of sight.
examples.chinese: 在整个夏季的几个月里，他们很少从视线中离开。

examples.english: Throughout the Sixties, man's first voyage to other worlds came closer.
examples.chinese: 在整个60年代，人类离首次去其他世界的航行更接近了。

examples.english: He wore an expression of angry contempt throughout the interrogation.
examples.chinese: 在整个审讯过程中，他脸上始终带着愤怒的鄙视。

examples.english: A patient reported a dream that had recurred throughout her life.
examples.chinese: 一位病人报告说她做了一个在她一生中反复出现的梦。

examples.english: All through the cruelly long journey home, he lay utterly motionless.
examples.chinese: 在整个痛苦漫长的回家旅途中，他一直躺着一动不动。

expressions.explanation:
如果想强调某事一直发生，可列出一天中的时间段或一年中的季节，或提及相互对照的时间段。

24/7 是一个缩写，代表一天 24 小时一周 7 天，用于非正式英语以及新闻报道。

examples.english: ...people coming in morning, noon, and night. ……
examples.chinese: 上午、中午和晚上来的人

examples.english: I've worn the same suit summer, winter, autumn and spring, for five years.
examples.chinese: 我春夏秋冬穿同一套衣服，穿了五年。

examples.english: Thousands of slave labourers worked night and day to build the fortifications.
examples.chinese: 成千上万的奴隶劳工夜以继日地建防御工程。

examples.english: Ten gardeners used to work this land, winter and summer.
examples.chinese: 十个园丁过去常常在这块地上耕作，不分冬夏。

examples.english: Each family was filmed 24 / 7 for six weeks.
examples.chinese: 每个家庭被每天 24 小时连续拍摄了 6 个星期。

centers.english: Showing the start or end of a period
centers.chinese: 表示时间段的开始或结束

expressions.explanation:
开始时间

 要表示情况持续的时间长度，也可使用介词短语指出情况的开始或结束时间或起止时间。

如果想谈论一个始于过去的情况现在仍在继续，或考虑从过去的一个时间到现在这段情况，可用介词 since 加时间状语或事件，表示情况的开始时间。动词用现在完成时。

since 也用于表示在过去结束的情况的开始时间。动词用过去完成时。

since 也可与其他表示时间点的介词短语连用。

since 后面的名词短语有时可指人或物, 而不是时间或事件, 在与最高级、first 或 only 或否定式连用时尤其如此。

examples.english: I've been here since twelve o'clock.
examples.chinese: 我从 12 点起一直在这里。

examples.english: I haven't had a new customer in here since Sunday.
examples.chinese: 从星期天以来，我这里还没来过一个新顾客。

examples.english: Since January, there hasn't been any more trouble.
examples.chinese: 自1月份以来，没有发生更多的麻烦。

examples.english: I haven't been out since Christmas.
examples.chinese: 自圣诞节以后我一直没出过门。

examples.english: The situation has not changed since 2001.
examples.chinese: 自 2001 年起，情况没有改变。

examples.english: There has been no word of my friend since the revolution.
examples.chinese: 自从革命发生后，还没有我朋友的消息。

examples.english: I'd been working in London since January at a firm called Kendalls.
examples.chinese: 从1月份起，我一直在伦敦一家名为肯德尔斯的公司工作。

examples.english: He hadn't prayed once since the morning.
examples.chinese: 他从早上起一次也没祈祷过。

examples.english: I'd only had two sandwiches since breakfast.
examples.chinese: 早餐后我只吃了两份三明治。

examples.english: I haven't seen you since before the summer.
examples.chinese: 从夏天前到现在，我一直没见到你。

examples.english: They hadn't seen each other since Majorca.
examples.chinese: 他们自从离开马略卡以后没见过面。

examples.english: I have never had another dog since Jonnie.
examples.chinese: 自从乔妮走了以后，我没再养过狗。

examples.english: Ever since London, I've been working towards this.
examples.chinese: 自从离开伦敦后，我一直在为此而努力。

expressions.explanation: 情况的开始时间也可用介词 from 加副词 on 或 onwards 表示。名词短语可以是日期、事件或时间段。动词可以用一般过去时或完成形式。

examples.english: ..the history of British industry from the mid sixties on. ……
examples.chinese: 从60年代中期起的英国工业史

examples.english: From the eighteenth century on, great private palaces went up.
examples.chinese: 从 18 世纪开始，宏大的私人宫殿开始兴建。

examples.english: But from the mid-1960s onwards the rate of public welfare spending has tended to accelerate.
examples.chinese: 但是从20世纪60年代中期往后，公共福利支出的速度有不断加快的倾向。

examples.english: The family size starts to influence development from birth.
examples.chinese: 家庭规模开始影响出生以后的发育。

examples.english: They never perceived that they themselves had forced women into this role from childhood.
examples.chinese: 他们从来没有认识到，他们自己迫使妇女从童年起就接受这个角色。

examples.english: ...the guide who had been with us from the beginning. ……
examples.chinese: 从一开始就和我们在一起的向导

expressions.explanation: 也可用介词 after 说明情况的开始时间。

examples.english: They don't let anybody in after six o'clock.
examples.chinese: 他们6点钟以后不允许任何人进入。

examples.english: After 1929 I concentrated on canvas work. 1929
examples.chinese: 年以后，我专注于帆布刺绣。

examples.english: He'd have a number of boys to help him through the summertime but after October he'd just have the one.
examples.chinese: 整个夏季会有好几个男孩来帮助他，但是10月份过后就只有这一个了。

expressions.explanation:
结束时间

 同样，如果想表示情况持续一段时间后停止，可用介词 until 加时间状语或事件说明结束时间。

until 也可与其他表示时间点的介词短语连用。 

until 也可用于否定句，表示某事在特定时间之前未发生或不会发生。

有些人用 till 代替 until，尤其是在非正式英语里。

有时也用 up to 和 up till，主要用在 now 和 then 之前。

examples.english: The school was kept open until ten o'clock five nights a week.
examples.chinese: 学校每星期五个晚上一直开门到 10 点。

examples.english: They danced and laughed and talked until dawn.
examples.chinese: 他们跳舞谈笑，直到天明。

examples.english: She walked back again and sat in her room until dinner.
examples.chinese: 她又走了回来，在房间里一直坐到吃晚饭。

examples.english: I've just discovered she's only here until Sunday.
examples.chinese: 我刚发现她只在这里留到星期天。

examples.english: He had been willing to wait until the following summer.
examples.chinese: 他愿意等到第二年夏天。

examples.english: Until the end of the 18th century little had been known about Persia.
examples.chinese: 直到18世纪末，人们对波斯所知甚少。

examples.english: Until that meeting, most of us knew very little about him.
examples.chinese: 在那次会面之前，我们中的大部分人对他了解甚少。

examples.english: We won't get them until September.
examples.chinese: 我们要到9月份才能得到它们。

examples.english: My plane does not leave until tomorrow morning.
examples.chinese: 我的航班明天早上才起飞。

examples.english: I decided to wait until after Easter to visit John.
examples.chinese: 我决定等到过了复活节去看约翰。

examples.english: Sometimes I lie in bed till nine o'clock.
examples.chinese: 有时我在床上躺到 9 点钟。

examples.english: Up to now, I have been happy with his work.
examples.chinese: 到目前为止，我对他的工作很满意。

examples.english: It was something he had never even considered up till now.
examples.chinese: 这是到目前为止他甚至从未考虑过的事情。

examples.english: I had a three-wheel bike up to a few years ago but it got harder and harder to push it along.
examples.chinese: 直到几年前我还有一辆三轮自行车，但它越来越难蹬。

examples.english: Up to 1989, growth averaged 1 per cent.
examples.chinese: 直到 1989 年，增长平均为 1%。

expressions.explanation: 介词 before 也可用于表示情况的结束时间。

examples.english: Before 1716 Cheltenham had been a small market town. 1716
examples.chinese: 年以前，切尔滕纳姆是一个小集镇。

expressions.explanation:
开始和结束时间

情况或事件的持续时间可以通过说明其起止时间表示。可用 from 表示开始时间，用 to、till 或 until 表示结束时间。

在美式英语里，through 常常置于两个时间之间

如果用数字指两个时间或两年，可以用短横代替 from 和 to 把两者隔开。...open 10-5 weekdays, 10-6 Saturdays and 2-6 Sundays. ……工作日 10—5 点开放，星期六 10—6 点开放，星期天 2—6 点开放。

examples.english: The Blitz on London began with nightly bombings from 7 September to 2 November.
examples.chinese: 对伦敦的空袭以夜间轰炸开始，从9月7日持续到11月2日。

examples.english: They are active in the line from about January until October.
examples.chinese: 他们从大约1月到 10 月一直活跃在第一线。

examples.english: They seem to be working from dawn till dusk.
examples.chinese: 他们好像从早到晚都在工作。也可用 between 和 and 代替 from 和 to。

examples.english: The car is usually in the garage between Sunday and Thursday in winter.
examples.chinese: 冬天的时候，这辆车在星期天和星期四之间通常停在车库内。

examples.english: The chat show goes out midnight through six a.m.
examples.chinese: 访谈节目从午夜播出一直到早上6点。

centers.english: Using time expressions to modify nouns
centers.chinese: 用时间表达式修饰名词

expressions.explanation:
也可用含基数词（cardinal number）和普通时间词的时间表达式修饰名词。注意，时间词上要加一撇 s。

基数词的这种用法在 2.231 小节论述。

examples.english: Four of those were sentenced to 15 days' detention.
examples.chinese: 那些人中的 4 个被判处 15 天拘留。

examples.english: They want to take on staff with two years' experience.
examples.chinese: 他们希望雇用有两年工作经验的员工。

expressions.explanation:
时间表达式也可作复合形容词（compound adjective）修饰可数名词。

复合形容词在 2.94 到 2.102 小节论述。

examples.english: They all have to start off with a six-month course in German.
examples.chinese: 他们都必须从为期6个月的德语课程开始。

examples.english: I arrived at the University for a three-month stint as a visiting lecturer.
examples.chinese: 我来到那个大学做为期 3 个月的客座讲师。
